stay strong #santorini ✨🌸🕊️💙🤍✨ one of a dream destination for many 

📍Santorini is one of the Cyclades islands in the Aegean Sea Famous’s for it’s beautiful blue & white cubiform houses & stunning sunset has been hit by earthquake recently as the Greek island continues to feel hundreds of temblors since the start of the month.
